title: Bhakta Dhruva
writer: Pandit Indra, Pandit Moti, Girish Pandit
actors: Jeevan Dhar, Sashi Kapoor, Leela Mishra
plot: Maharaj Uttanpath decides to re-marry Suruchi after he finds that his first wife, Sunita, is unable to bear any children. Shortly after the marriage, first Sunita and then Suruchi both give birth to sons, Dhruva and Uttam. Suruchi...
